title: epidendrum cyclolobum
intro: Epidendrum cyclolobum is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum cyclolobum include alleviating coughs, reducing inflammation, and promoting relaxation. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
